title: Great Bedwars 16x
description: The remix of Simple Bedwars & Better Bedwars. This includes clean Bedwars PvP texture pack for Minecraft 1.21.5 with short swords, smooth blocks, low fire, and FPS-Booster.
body:
Great Bedwars is a clean 16x PvP resource pack designed for Bedwars and competitive Minecraft gameplay.

Features:
* Short swords
* Smooth wool textures
* Clean GUI
* Low fire
* FPS-Booster
* Simple competitive style

**A remix of Simple Bedwars and Better Bedwars with additional edits and modern 1.21.5 compatibility fixes.**
